title: UKDeals Direct® Elbow Grease Air Fryer Cleaner Spray | Spray, Foam, Wipe, Rinse - Cuts Through Dirt, Grease & Grime (Lemon Fresh, 500ml)
features: TOUGH ON GREASE & GRIME: This air fryer cleaner is expertly formulated to cut through stubborn dirt and baked-on grease. Ideal for post-dinner clean-ups or weekend deep cleans, it tackles mess with ease and keeps your air fryer oven looking brand new.

SPRAY, FOAM, WIPE, RINSE: Cleaning is simple – just spray, wipe, and rinse for fuss-free results. Whether cleaning a fryer basket or interior tray, this cleaner saves time and effort, even on the stickiest spills or most stubborn build-up.

POWERFUL DEGREASING ACTION: Packed with degreasing power, this Elbow Grease formula is perfect for air fryers and can be used daily. Whether frying chips, meats or veggies, it removes residues that other kitchen cleaners often leave behind.

LEMON FRESH FRAGRANCE: Enjoy a clean that smells as good as it looks. The uplifting Lemon Fresh scent leaves your kitchen with a pleasant citrus finish after every clean, turning an everyday chore into a refreshing experience.

EASY-TO-USE TRIGGER SPRAY: The ergonomic spray nozzle provides smooth, even coverage across your fryer surfaces. Whether tackling corners or trays, it ensures each spray delivers just the right amount.

SUITABLE FOR ALL BRANDS: Whether using a compact model or a large family-sized fryer, this cleaner works with all types of air fryer ovens. Keep every kitchen appliance spotless with just one reliable cleaning spray.

LONG-LASTING 500ML BOTTLE: Each 500ml bottle provides plenty of use, making it a cost-effective choice for regular air fryer maintenance. Whether used daily or weekly, it delivers powerful cleans without running out too soon.
description: Tackle the toughest kitchen build-up with the Elbow Grease Air Fryer Cleaner Spray – the must-have solution for restoring your air fryer oven to sparkling clean. Specially designed to power through baked-on grease, grime, and lingering food odours, this powerful degreaser makes it easy to maintain your appliance after every use. With its fresh lemon fragrance, it not only deep cleans but leaves your kitchen smelling bright and zesty. Ideal for everyday maintenance or deep cleans, this spray is quick to apply – simply spray, wipe, rinse, and let your air fryer shine like new. Safe for use on non-stick surfaces when used as directed, it’s an essential part of your kitchen cleaning routine. Whether it’s a weekly spruce-up or a post-roast rescue, this cleaner makes light work of even the messiest jobs. A brilliant addition to any collection of kitchen cleaning products, this 500ml spray delivers long-lasting use and outstanding results. Make cleaning your air fryer easy, effective and satisfying with Elbow Grease – the trusted name in powerful kitchen degreasers.
